hooks.command: cd /home/phil/repos/stonks && py_files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M HEAD -- 'backend/**/*.py' 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- 'backend/**/*.py' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$py_files" ]; then cd backend && echo "$py_files" | sed 's|^backend/||' | xargs uv run ruff format 2>/dev/null && echo "$py_files" | sed 's|^backend/||' | xargs uv run ruff check --fix 2>/dev/null; fi; js_files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M HEAD -- 'frontend/**/*.ts' 'frontend/**/*.tsx' 'frontend/**/*.js' 'frontend/**/*.jsx' 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- 'frontend/**/*.ts' 'frontend/**/*.tsx' 'frontend/**/*.js' 'frontend/**/*.jsx' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$js_files" ]; then cd /home/phil/repos/stonks/frontend && echo "$js_files" | sed 's|^frontend/||' | xargs npx eslint --fix 2>/dev/null; fi; true
